services.name: Quantum Machine Learning Consulting
services.tagline: Technical consulting around practical QML methods and strategy.
services.description: Advisory and implementation support for organizations exploring quantum machine learning — including model selection, benchmarking, feasibility analysis, and quantum-readiness strategy.

services.name: Hybrid Quantum-Classical Model Development
services.tagline: Design and evaluation of hybrid QML pipelines.
services.description: Development of resource-aware quantum machine learning pipelines and benchmarking against classical baselines under realistic hardware constraints.

services.name: Quantum Computing & QML Training
services.tagline: Structured workshops and multi-level training in quantum computing.
services.description: Training programs for students, research groups, and companies covering beginner to advanced topics in quantum computing, Qiskit, and quantum machine learning.
